detailed_description: This video captures a barista in a unique squatting position on a cafe counter, skillfully pouring steamed milk from a metal pitcher into a paper coffee cup to create latte art. The woman is entirely focused on the intricate process, demonstrating her expertise and interaction with the coffee-making tools. The environment is a clean, modern cafe with a menu board and various coffee-related items in the background.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment is the core semantic moment as it continuously showcases the skilled process of the barista making coffee. It demonstrates the 'Process/Labor' of creating the drink and 'Product Interaction' with the tools, all while maintaining a visually engaging and unique posture. There is no setup, calibration, or post-action dead air to trim; the action is central throughout.
